name: West Virginia Division of Labor Contractor License Search
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official Division of Labor database search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: West Virginia contractor license records exposed by the Division of Labor database search
knownExclusions: The Division of Labor database search links multiple lists, including contractors, HVAC technicians, plumbers, and manufactured housing licensees; this source entry is primarily scoped to contractor license search.
Local permits, business registrations, and non-Division-of-Labor authorizations are outside this source entry.
Separate HVAC and plumbing lists may need separate entries or adapter filters before normalization.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Prefer official downloadable lists if confirmed before lookup automation.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, certification, or registration does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The Division of Labor database search links current lists and lookup paths, but no redistribution-safe bulk path is confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for West Virginia contractor license search. Future work should decide whether HVAC and plumbing lists become separate sources.
maintainerNotes: Keep contractor, HVAC, and plumbing source boundaries explicit in future adapter work.
